title.rendered: Video from Lenovo Supplier Conference, May 2017 in Hangzhou, China

content.rendered:
A group from AMI, including our President and Founder, Mr. Subramonian Shankar, as well as representatives from our Taiwan and China offices, recently attended the Lenovo Supplier Conference in Hangzhou, China.

At the conference, AMI was awarded the Lenovo Diamond Supplier Award – a special occasion that marked the first time for AMI to receive this prestigious distinction from Lenovo as a top supporter of Lenovo across multiple business engagements.

We were fortunate to get video and photos from the event itself, giving us a peek inside the gala event at the moment AMI was honored with the award and have posted a brief video to our AMItv YouTube Channel to share:

Link to video on AMItv: https://youtu.be/0YYsfkL2HAc
